title: Your Choice
lyrics: Yeah, there's a choice in front of you You've got a left or right in front of you The middle is falling away Scissors are in front of you Do you know what you wanna do? Even if you fly, even if you fall It's up, it's all right Where it belongs, it's just a fight It's just a pattern of your always life The night, you gotta reach harder than you thought you'd do Pulling a fight from you, it's a right for you Don't sit in the lava yourself Don't make it hard, release the yard Release the thoughts that make you, you Changes never go me, yeah, changes never go you Which way you go, which way you roll Well, that's up to you, you, you, you Not the you from the bottom of you The autonomous you, the one that makes you feel Most connected to the light We are the divine, right from the stars Can you hear yourself and your heart As it echoes the cosmos right back to you Everything is just right where it was supposed to be It's falling into place, you can see the end of the race You can see your only true face When you stare at the lights in the night In the long and beyond, it's all just All your favorite songs that you are The part of you, the weather, hey It warped your mind, it warped your time Yeah, it's just a little of pain A little window of pain that you will Come through to see, isn't it that? The pieces are right where they're Supposed to be, there's no need for Regretting the instances, remember it Embrace your past and love the you That's you right now, go find your ground Be the thing that you hear, the echo around your mind There's a choice in front of you this time Take the way you know in your heart Don't be cold, know it's a start You're here, that's a start You're right where you belong

lyricsSegments.text: Yeah, there's a choice in front of you You've got a left or right in front of you
The middle is falling away Scissors are in front of you
Do you know what you wanna do? Even if you fly, even if you fall
It's up, it's all right
Where it belongs, it's just a fight It's just a pattern of your always life
The night, you gotta reach harder than you thought you'd do
Pulling a fight from you, it's a right for you Don't sit in the lava yourself
Don't make it hard, release the yard Release the thoughts that make you, you
Changes never go me, yeah, changes never go you Which way you go, which way you roll
Well, that's up to you, you, you, you Not the you from the bottom of you
The autonomous you, the one that makes you feel Most connected to the light
We are the divine, right from the stars Can you hear yourself and your heart
As it echoes the cosmos right back to you Everything is just right where it was supposed to be
It's falling into place, you can see the end of the race You can see your only true face
When you stare at the lights in the night In the long and beyond, it's all just
All your favorite songs that you are The part of you, the weather, hey
It warped your mind, it warped your time Yeah, it's just a little of pain
A little window of pain that you will Come through to see, isn't it that?
The pieces are right where they're Supposed to be, there's no need for
Regretting the instances, remember it Embrace your past and love the you
That's you right now, go find your ground Be the thing that you hear, the echo around your mind
There's a choice in front of you this time Take the way you know in your heart
Don't be cold, know it's a start You're here, that's a start
You're right where you belong
